name: foldnize-app
description: Foldnize desktop app — Electron UI on top of the foldnize library.

scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run build:main && npm run build:renderer && npm run build:assets
scripts.pack: npm run build && npm run icons:build && electron-builder --dir
scripts.dist: npm run build && npm run icons:build && electron-builder
scripts.dist:mac: npm run build && npm run icons:build && npm run dmg:build && electron-builder --mac
scripts.dist:win: npm run build && npm run icons:build && electron-builder --win
scripts.dist:linux: npm run build && npm run icons:build && electron-builder --linux

author: Matheus Chignolli
